name: body-parser
usage_summary: Used in packages/app/src/cli/services/dev/graphiql/server.ts at line 177 as app.use(bodyParser.json()) to parse JSON request bodies for the GraphiQL POST endpoint (/graphiql/graphql.json). This is the sole call site. Express 4.x (version 4.21.2 is declared) bundles body-parser and re-exports it as express.json(), making the standalone package redundant.
total_releases_24m_note: Could not fetch NPM registry data: Bash and WebFetch tools are unavailable in this session.
how_to_remove: Replace the single line 'app.use(bodyParser.json())' with 'app.use(express.json())'. Remove the import 'import bodyParser from body-parser' from server.ts. Remove 'body-parser' from packages/app/package.json dependencies. express.json() is available in Express 4.x and is identical in behaviour.
replacement_reason: Express 4.x (already a declared dependency) provides express.json() which is body-parser's json() middleware re-exported. No additional package needed.
